title: Add Objects Link from ERD Back to Dictionary with Guided Popover
story: As a DataTools Pro user viewing an ERD, I want a clear link to navigate back to the dictionary page to add more objects, with a guided popover showing me where to click, so that I can easily expand my ERD without confusion.
description:
## Context
During a demo, users were confused about how to add more objects while on the ERD page. The only option was to navigate back to the Dictionary manually, which was not discoverable.

## Behavior
1. An "Add More Objects" link is added to the upper-right area of the ERD page.
2. The link navigates to `dashboard?view=dictionary&addobjects=true`.
3. When the Dictionary page loads with `addobjects=true`, a popover tooltip appears over the "Select Objects" button guiding the user to click it.
4. The popover is shown only when the `addobjects` parameter is present.

## Implementation Detail
The "Select Objects" button is styled using a CSS `:before` pseudo-element to appear as a button, since clicking it triggers a multi-select dropdown. The popover is positioned above this element.
acceptance_criteria: An Add More Objects link is visible in the upper-right of the ERD page
Link navigates to the dictionary page with addobjects=true parameter
A popover tooltip appears over the Select Objects button when addobjects=true
Popover is not shown during normal dictionary navigation
Navigation is consistent with existing dictionary and migration page patterns
ux_changes: New 'Add More Objects' link on the ERD page with guided popover tooltip on the Dictionary page when navigated via the addobjects parameter.
implementation_notes: The Select Objects button uses a CSS :before pseudo-element for styling. Popover is conditionally displayed based on the addobjects URL parameter. Positioned above the Select Objects multiselect trigger.
comment_summary: Developer added the button and implemented the popover on the Select Objects element. Confirmed the popover appears above the button when addobjects=true.
